zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fiske於大約1550年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德時，他的父親Robert Fiske31歲，母親Sybil Gould26歲。他於大約1569年與Anne Anstye在英國素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1623年5月在英國諾福爾可迪其加姆享年74歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可迪其加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fiske于大约1550年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德时，他的父亲Robert Fiske31岁，母亲Sybil Gould26岁。他于大约1569年与Anne Anstye在英国素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1623年5月在英国諾福爾可迪其加姆享年74岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可迪其加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When William Fiske was born about 1550, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Fiske, was 31 and his mother, Sybil Gould, was 26. He married Anne Anstye about 1569, in South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in May 1623, in Ditchingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Ditchingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fiske est né environ 1550, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Fiske, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Sybil Gould, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anne Anstye environ 1569, à South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1623, à Ditchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Ditchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Fiske um 1550 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Fiske 31 und seine Mutter Sybil Gould 26. Er hat um 1569 in South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England Anne Anstye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1623 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Ditchingham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Ditchingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Fiske è nato il circa 1550 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Fiske, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Sybil Gould, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Anne Anstye circa 1569, nel South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1623, nel Ditchingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Ditchingham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Fiskeが約1550年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで生まれた時，父Robert Fiskeは31歳，母Sybil Gouldは26歳であった。約1569年にイギリススフォルクソウス エルムハム スト ジャムスでAnne Anstyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1623年5月にイギリスノーフォルクディトチンガムで74歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクディトチンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Fiske(이)가 대략 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Fiske(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil Gould(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1569년 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스에서 Anne Anstye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1623년 5월 영국 노르폴크 딧친그함에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 딧친그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Fiske nasceu aproximadamente 1550, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Fiske, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Gould, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Anstye aproximadamente 1569, em South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1623, em Ditchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Ditchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fiske родился около 1550 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Fiske было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sybil Gould, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Anstye около 1569 г. в местности соут элмхам ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер май 1623 г. в местности дичингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности дичингхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Fiske nació aproximadamente 1550, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Fiske, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Sybil Gould, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Anne Anstye aproximadamente 1569, en South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1623, en Ditchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Ditchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
